title: Mock Test 52 - Causative Verbs (have/get something done)
description: Causative Verbs নিয়ে ২০টি প্রশ্ন। Have/get something done, Have/let/make someone do something, Get someone to do something — গঠন ও ব্যবহার।

questions.question: Causative 'have something done' structure কী?
questions.explanation: 'Have + object + V3' = অন্যকে দিয়ে কাজ করানো। যেমন: I had my hair cut.

questions.question: 'I had my car repaired.' — এর অর্থ কী?
options: আমি অন্যকে দিয়ে গাড়ি মেরামত করালাম
questions.explanation: 'Had my car repaired' = causative (অন্যকে দিয়ে করানো)।

questions.question: 'Get something done' structure কী?
questions.explanation: 'Get + object + V3' = have something done-এর মতো কিন্তু less formal।

questions.question: 'Make someone do something' অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Make + someone + V1' = force/bang kora। যেমন: She made me cry.

questions.question: 'Let someone do something' অর্থ কী?
questions.explanation: 'Let + someone + V1' = allow/permit। যেমন: Let him go.

questions.question: I need to ___ my hair cut.
questions.explanation: 'Have something done' — 'have my hair cut'।

questions.question: She ___ him clean the whole house.
questions.explanation: 'Made him clean' = তাকে পরিষ্কার করতে বাধ্য করল।

questions.question: My father ___ me use his car.
questions.explanation: 'Let me use' = অনুমতি দিল।

questions.question: I ___ my watch repaired yesterday.
questions.explanation: 'Had my watch repaired' — causative (past)।

questions.question: Can you ___ someone to help us?
questions.explanation: 'Get someone to do' = arrange for someone to help।

questions.question: Error: 'I had my hair cutted.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Cut' → V3 = 'cut' (irregular)। 'cutted' ভুল। সঠিক: I had my hair cut.

questions.question: Error: 'She made him to go.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Make + someone + V1' (to ছাড়া)। 'She made him go.'

questions.question: Error: 'Let him to speak.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Let + someone + V1' (to ছাড়া)। 'Let him speak.'

questions.question: Error: 'I got my car repair.' — ভুল?
questions.explanation: 'Get something done' → V3 লাগবে। 'I got my car repaired.'

questions.question: Fill: 'I need to get my computer ___ (fix).'
questions.explanation: 'Get + object + V3' → 'get my computer fixed'।

questions.question: Fill: 'The teacher ___ the students stay after class.'
questions.explanation: 'Made them stay' = বাধ্য করলেন।

questions.question: Fill: 'I ___ my house painted last month.'
questions.explanation: 'Had my house painted' — causative।

questions.question: Fill: 'She ___ her son play outside.'
questions.explanation: 'Let her son play' = অনুমতি দিল।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'আমি আমার চুল কাটিয়েছি।' (causative)
questions.explanation: 'Had my hair cut' = causative ( অন্যকে দিয়ে কাটানো)।

questions.question: অনুবাদ: 'সে তাকে যেতে বাধ্য করল।'
questions.explanation: 'Made him go' = বাধ্য করল।
